falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above the 50-day moving average by more than 3% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would contradict the 'HOLD' signal and suggest a reversal from the bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 50 (current score: 36) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 50 indicates extreme momentum, invalidating the 'HOLD' by confirming a blowoff top rather than a bottom.

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX volatility index drops below 15 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained low volatility would contradict the current pattern's implied uncertainty, falsifying the 'HOLD' verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
